name: 37"x1.5" Charlotte Print Outdoor Bench Cushion - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate your outdoor seating space with this Charlotte Print Outdoor Bench Cushion from Room Essentials™. Made of 100% recycled polyester with foam filling for plush comfort, this rectangular bench cushion adorns a checkered charlotte print for a vibrant charm. The sewn-seam closure with knife edges and round corners lend a sleek look, while the side ties allow easy attachment. Plus, this water-repellant cushion is resistant to weather and UV rays, making it a perfect choice for patio benches or garden couch.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
